note: Per performer-character PERFORMANCE evidence. Each non-species claim is pinned to a Memory Alpha revision + content hash and carries a VERIFIED affirmative basis quote (verified=true means the quote is present in that pinned revision). Species membership is carried from the sourced census graph.
